name: Tail - changed special (200 followers I guess?)
description:
hi, I finally finished something personal and now I can make bots. Woohoo...

Considering that I hit 200 followers, I decided to revamp my tail bot for good Considering that the old on is ass and was mainly made using a different api before janitor llm was a thing.

This is not EXACTLY accurate to the canon tail as I made a few changes, one of them being her origin/lore, and good god it's soo fucking ass that it made me cook up a new one from scratch. It's probably worse than the original but I tried.

This one is female like the old one, and I know the canon is probably male due to the way is depicted, but I don't give a shit, and I don't plan to make a male variant yet.

Anyway, enjoy this sloppy content.
I forgot to mention that I'm trying a new way to write initial message, basically it barely describes {{user}} in it so it gives people more freedom to do with the scenario. I'm not sure if any of you prefer this, or the old third person perspective that I used in my previous bots, would be appreciated if you tell me your experience about the new initial message.

update: I gave her the alias of "Oumu" to reference the made up name on tvtropes. (I Don't care if it has inaccurate info about changed, this shit is funny to me.)
creator: Tecker
